channel.title: Carbone Notes
channel.description: Notes, thoughts, and guides from the Carbone ecosystem — written plainly, published openly.

item.title: The Science of Rest: Rethinking Digital Fatigue
item.description:
We are living through a massive, unmonitored human trial. Every waking hour, we feed our brains continuous streams of high-intensity digital stimulation. We wake up to notifications, eat lunch scrolling through feeds, and go to bed with bright screens inches from our eyes.

The Dopamine D...

item.title: The Cloud Repatriation Movement is Gaining Steam
item.description:
For the past decade, the tech mantra was simple: migrate everything to the cloud. AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud became the default destinations for startups and enterprises alike. But in 2026, a growing counter-cultural movement is gaining ground: cloud repatriation.

The True Cost of Conv...

item.title: Vaping : What Nobody Tells You Before You Start
item.description:
I started vaping a month ago. I'm quitting while writing this.

Nobody handed me a warning label. Nobody said: this thing reaches your brain in ten seconds, rewires your dopamine, and turns a casual habit into a need before you've even noticed. I just picked it up — because it looked...
